name: Missing Data Report
description: Generates a per-form missing data report for the current project, accounting for REDCap branching logic and repeated instruments. Displays form name, event, arm, repeat instrument, repeat instance, missing field count, and missing variable names.

authors.name: Andrew Bauleni
authors.institution: Institute for Community Health Innovation UAMS

project-settings.name: Forms to exclude from report (comma-separated form names)
Additional field types to exclude (comma-separated, e.g. notes,file)
